title: lomandra pauciflora
intro: Lomandra pauciflora, also known as the blue lilyturf or blue strap, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lomandra pauciflora include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Lomandra pauciflora can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
